headline: Intuitive Surgical Stock Looks Weighed Down. Its After-Hours Growth Says Otherwise.
summary: While investors fixate on slowing elective surgeries, a powerful, non-obvious growth engine is accelerating inside the company's U.S. business.

headline: J&J's MedTech Segment Eyes Another Strong Quarter in Q2
summary: JNJ's Q2 MedTech results will test whether cardiovascular, surgery and vision strength can offset ongoing China VBP headwinds and sustain growth.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Medtronic, Lowers Price Target to $105
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $106 to $105.
